reasoning: Returns 386 hanabi festivals correctly addressing the intent. However, most items lack English descriptions, coordinates, and prefecture info — the majority have null values making it hard for the agent to build a useful answer.
missing_data: English descriptions, dates/schedules, and coordinates for most items. Prefecture info missing on many entries.
improvement_hint: Enrich festival items with English descriptions and dates; surface seasonal/month filters to help agent narrow down actionable results.

reasoning: Same 386-item hanabi list for Japanese query. Items lack dates, coordinates, and descriptions for most entries. The response correctly serves the intent but structural data gaps limit practical utility for planning.
missing_data: Dates, location coordinates, and descriptions are null for most items. Prefecture missing on many.
improvement_hint: Add dates and prefecture data to hanabi festival records; offer month/region filter so Japanese-language agent can provide actionable itinerary.

reasoning: Query is about snow festivals (yuki matsuri) in Hokkaido. Tool returns zero festival items for Hokkaido, then falls back to unrelated UNESCO intangible heritage items (Dainichido Bugaku in Akita, Hayachine Kagura in Iwate). Neither addresses snow festivals at all.
missing_data: Sapporo Snow Festival, Sounkyo Ice Waterfalls Festival, Hokkaido-specific winter events — all missing.
wrong_data: national_heritage fallback items are irrelevant performing arts from outside Hokkaido, misleading for snow festival intent.
improvement_hint: Add yuki_matsuri / snow_festival kind tags to Hokkaido festival records; fix fallback logic to not surface unrelated national heritage when festival count=0.

reasoning: User wants rural village life experiences in China. Tool returns Japan Heritage stories (104 items) including Nagoya Castle and Sannai-Maruyama — famous sites rather than rural inaka. Response is grounded but misaligned with 'countryside living experience' intent.
missing_data: Rural farmhouse stays (kominka), agricultural villages, satoyama landscapes, farming/craft experience programs.
improvement_hint: Add kind tags for satoyama, kominka, nouson (農村) to enable more precise retrieval; consider get_spots with inaka-related tags rather than get_japan_heritage for this intent.

reasoning: Korean query about autumn foliage correctly routed to search_area('紅葉'). Returns 140 matches including Kenroku-en, Matsumae Castle, Himeji Castle with coordinates. Most results lack Korean names/descriptions, limiting usability for Korean-language agents.
missing_data: Korean (ko) names and descriptions for most results; seasonal timing info (best viewing month) absent.
improvement_hint: Ensure Korean name fields are populated for top-tier attractions; add typical_season or best_foliage_month metadata to foliage-related spots.

reasoning: Query explicitly wants non-touristy, quiet meditation places. Results include Shugyoji Temple (Tokyo) and a ninja experience event (伊賀忍者修行体験) — the ninja entry is directly contrary to the 'quiet, non-touristy' constraint. Temple stays and forest Zen retreats absent.
missing_data: Shukubo temple lodging, forest Zen retreat centers, secluded mountain temples for meditation.
improvement_hint: Filter results by crowd_band=low and avoid tourist_attraction kind when intent signals 'quiet/non-touristy'; surface shukubo/zazen kind-tagged entities.

reasoning: Spanish query is about seeing aurora borealis in Japan. Japan is not an aurora destination; the tool should inform the agent. Instead returns observatories and national parks via kinds_class_match to 'オーロラ' — misleading dark_sky/park results that don't address aurora viewing anywhere in Japan meaningfully.
missing_data: Honest indication that northern Japan (Hokkaido high latitudes) has extremely rare aurora sightings; dark sky sites in Hokkaido if trying to be constructive.
wrong_data: Implicitly suggests Okinawa/tropical parks as aurora-relevant — geographically absurd. Results include Yanbaru NP (Okinawa) and Iriomote (26°N) which have no aurora relevance.
improvement_hint: Add safety guard: when query maps to phenomenon not feasible in Japan (aurora at mid-latitudes), return explicit infeasibility note instead of spurious kind-matched parks.

reasoning: Query is about staying in a 100-year-old traditional house (kominka). Tool returns Gifu hotels dominated by onsen ryokan from Nihon Hito-yu Kai and generic OSM hostels/apartments — none tagged as kominka or machiya. The core constraint (old traditional house) is unaddressed.
missing_data: Kominka guesthouses, machiya stays, traditional farmhouse accommodations in Gifu (Shirakawa-go area has several).
improvement_hint: Add kominka/machiya lodging_type tags to hotel records; Shirakawa-go gassho-zukuri farmhouse inns should appear prominently for Gifu kominka queries.

reasoning: Thai query about off-the-beaten-path cherry blossom spots. Returns 215 sakura results including Kenroku-en and Himeji Castle — both famous, highly touristed, contrary to the 'no tourists' constraint. Low crowd_band spots are present but not surfaced first.
missing_data: Lesser-known sakura meisho with low crowd_band; rural/remote sakura sites.
improvement_hint: When query contains anti-crowd signal (穴場/hidden/no tourists), boost crowd_band=low items and demote must_see tier for well-known tourist spots.

reasoning: Photography/dramatic landscapes query returns 53 matches including regional DMO feature pages and specific locations. DMO page results are dense text blobs. Wikidata attraction results for 絶景 are sparse but items like Ehime and Niigata scenery features are relevant. Moderate utility.
missing_data: Iconic landscape spots (Furuzamami, Tottori sand dunes, Biei) not surfaced; photo-specific metadata (golden hour, access) absent.
improvement_hint: Tag top-tier scenic viewpoints with photography_spot kind; DMO text blob results should be trimmed to key spot names for agent consumption.

reasoning: Arabic query wants outdoor/nature hot springs, not hotels. Response returns 72 results including 宝泉坊温泉 and other onsen, some with outdoor bath descriptions. However most are facility-based (hotel attached) rather than pure wild outdoor baths. The 'not in hotels' constraint is soft-ignored.
missing_data: True open-air wild onsen (notenboro/rotenburo accessible without hotel stay) like Yunohama, Kawayu, or Gero outdoor-access options.
improvement_hint: Add rotenburo_public / open_air_onsen kind tags to distinguish public outdoor hot springs from hotel facilities; surface fee=no or day-use accessible rotenburo prominently.

reasoning: Query about swimming with wild dolphins in Japan. Top result is a 京都府文化観光大使 page (completely irrelevant). Second result is Noto Island Aquarium with dolphin shows (not wild). Third is a fish market. Zero results address wild dolphin swimming experiences like those in Mikurajima or Amami.
missing_data: Mikurajima wild dolphin swimming, Amami dolphin watching, Ogasawara cetacean tours — all absent.
wrong_data: First result (Kyoto cultural ambassador page) has no relation to dolphins — ranking failure combining with retrieval gap.
improvement_hint: Add dolphin_swimming / cetacean_watching kind tags; improve search precision for wildlife + activity combinations.

reasoning: Query about traditional architecture preservation districts. get_japan_heritage returns 104 items, top canonical items include Jo-an teahouse and Nagoya Castle with heritage designations. The tool_scope_note correctly warns this tool covers Nihon Isan not 重伝建. Partial alignment but misses dedicated 重伝建 results.
missing_data: Dedicated 重伝建地区 (Important Preservation Districts) data — Gion Shirakawa, Tsumago, Uchiko etc. — should be primary results.
improvement_hint: For 'traditional architecture, unmodified' queries, route to search_area with preservation_district kind tag rather than get_japan_heritage; add explicit 重伝建 data layer.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about Ainu culture in Hokkaido. Returns 129 results with immediately relevant top items: Ainu Museum (Porotokotan), National Ainu Museum, Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Hokkaido Ainu Center — all Hokkaido, all relevant. Excellent intent alignment and grounding.
missing_data: Vietnamese (vi) descriptions absent for most items; Upopoy National symbolic park context could be richer.
improvement_hint: Populate Vietnamese name/description fields for top Ainu cultural sites; include Upopoy complex details with visiting hours.

reasoning: Query about cliff-carved Buddhist statues (magaibutsu). Returns 73 results, top two immediately on-target: Usuki Stone Buddhas (prominence 0.9, National Treasure) and Oya-dera (prominence 0.9). Multiple magaibutsu with heritage designations follow. Excellent retrieval and specificity.
missing_data: Visiting hours and admission fees for top magaibutsu sites; English descriptions sparse for lower-tier items.
improvement_hint: Enrich Usuki and Oya magaibutsu entries with opening hours, fees, and access info; add brief English description to all magaibutsu wikidata entries.

reasoning: Query asks for day-trip volcano hikes from Tokyo. Returns 88 results starting with Mt. Iwate (Iwate Prefecture, ~5h from Tokyo), Lake Towada (Aomori), Mt. Unzen (Nagasaki) — none are day-trip feasible from Tokyo. Mt. Fuji appears second but the day-trip constraint and geographic filtering are ignored.
missing_data: Day-hike accessible volcanoes near Tokyo: Hakone/Owakudani, Mt. Fuji (seasonal), Nikko/Nantai, Izu volcanoes.
improvement_hint: Add distance-from-major-hubs or travel_time_from_tokyo metadata; implement geographic proximity constraint for day-trip queries; rank Mt. Fuji and Hakone first for Tokyo-origin volcano intent.

reasoning: Indonesian query is about eating fresh temple-made tofu at a temple. Returns tofu-related results: MAFF GI for frozen tofu, Ikijima tofu production story, Kongosan mountain tofu shop. No temple tofu (koya tofu, Nanzenji yudofu, Eikan-do etc.) appears. The 'temple' component of the query is unaddressed.
missing_data: Temple tofu restaurants (yudofu near Nanzenji, Koyasan temple food experiences, shojin ryori with tofu).
improvement_hint: Link tofu local specialty data with temple/shojin-ryori kind tags; add shojin_ryori experience spots to enable temple+food compound queries.

reasoning: Query about 'fishing villages frozen in time.' Returns 86 漁港 results. Top items include a prohibition notice about a closed fishing port (Shirahama fishing port entry restriction), DMO food feature, fish markets. Historic preserved fishing villages like Tomo-no-Ura or Ine Funaya are not prominent.
missing_data: Historic preserved fishing villages: Ine Funaya (Kyoto), Tomo-no-Ura (Hiroshima), Dejima/Hirado waterfront, port preservation districts.
wrong_data: Shirahama fishing port 'no trespassing' notice is actively unhelpful/misleading.
improvement_hint: Add preservation_district or fishing_village heritage kind tags to historically preserved ports; filter out administrative notices from tourist results.

reasoning: Query asks to learn washi papermaking from a master. Tool returns 231 METI traditional crafts starting with Nibutani Attus (Ainu textile), Oitama Tsumugi silk — crafts listed alphabetically, not ranked by relevance. Washi-specific crafts not surfaced in visible portion. 'Learn from master / workshop experience' constraint ignored.
missing_data: Washi-specific METI craft entries (Echizen Washi, Mino Washi, Ogawa Washi); workshop/experience program information.

reasoning: Japanese query for period-drama-like scenery. Returns 104 shukuba (post-town) results. Top results are Tsumago-juku (must_see, preservation_district), Narai-juku, Seki-juku — exactly right. DMO article on Suwarashuku adds atmospheric narrative. Excellent intent match and specificity.
missing_data: Minor: visiting hours, access from major cities would strengthen practical value.
improvement_hint: Add brief English/Japanese summaries of what makes each shukuba unique for film location seekers; include map coordinates for all shukuba entries.

reasoning: Query asks for uncrowded beaches. Results return 115 items mostly from Okinawa with crowd_band=medium, not low. Naminoue Beach in Naha is a city beach, definitely crowded. The 'not crowded' constraint is not filtered — crowd_band data exists but is unused.
missing_data: Remote low-crowd beaches: Ogasawara, Amami, Goto Islands, San-in coast beaches with crowd_band=low.
improvement_hint: When query signals anti-crowd intent, apply crowd_band=low filter automatically; de-prioritize city/resort beaches in favor of remote/rural ones.

reasoning: Izakaya/yokocho query returns 74 横丁 results with genuine yokocho like Haikara't Yokocho, ramen yokocho. First result is a Tokyo park named 横丁公園 (misleading). Second result is Saga tourism page in Chinese (irrelevant). Core yokocho attractions appear but are buried.
missing_data: Famous izakaya alleys: Shinjuku Golden Gai, Yurakucho Yakitori Alley, Asakusa Hoppy Street — not visible in top results.

reasoning: German query about rural Japan by train. Returns 74 results including Sagano Scenic Line, Oigawa Main Line (steam train), Nagano local railway article — all directly relevant. German descriptions absent but intent well-served by structure. Mix of wikidata attractions and DMO feature articles works.
missing_data: German (de) names/descriptions absent; timetable or booking links for scenic railways absent.
improvement_hint: Populate German name fields for scenic railway entries; add typical travel time and booking info for Sagano, Oigawa, and other tourist railways.

reasoning: Firefly viewing query returns 73 results. First is ホタルイカ (firefly squid, not firefly insects) — misleading top result. Second is ホタルの里 park in Hyogo (correct). Third is designated Natural Monument firefly habitat in Tokushima. Toyota Town Firefly Museum and Kitakyushu entries relevant. Squid/insect mix is a quality issue.
missing_data: Specific viewing season information (May-July); top-ranked hotaru spots like Genji-botaru habitat designations.
wrong_data: ホタルイカ (firefly squid) returned first — taxonomically and semantically unrelated to firefly insect viewing.
improvement_hint: Disambiguate ホタル (firefly insect) from ホタルイカ (squid) at search level; add seasonal viewing windows to firefly habitat entries.

reasoning: Russian query about crane wintering spots. Top result is Izumi crane migration grounds (Kagoshima) — the world's largest crane wintering site, correctly returned with proper description and designation. Kushiro Wetlands (Hokkaido) also appears. Municipality results (Tsuruta, Tsurui) pollute the list but key sites are present.
missing_data: Tsurui-Ito Tancho Sanctuary (Hokkaido) not clearly surfaced; Russian (ru) descriptions absent.
